name: Orb of Dragonkind
description: Long ago, in the Dragonlance setting, elves and humans waged war against chromatic dragons. The wizards of the Towers of High Sorcery forged five Orbs of Dragonkind to help defeat the dragons. Their magic has been warped over centuries, and only three are thought to survive.

properties.appearance: Etched crystal globe about 10 inches diameter, grows to 20 inches when used with mist swirling inside

control_check.activation: Magic action to peer into depths
control_check.on_failed_save: Orb imposes Charmed condition while you remain attuned

charmed_effects.suggestion: Orb casts Suggestion at will (save DC 18)
charmed_effects.purpose: Urges you toward evil ends the dragon essence desires (annihilation, freedom, suffering, Tiamat worship, etc.)

spells.requirement: You must control orb to cast

call_dragons.effect: Orb issues telepathic call extending 40 miles in all directions
call_dragons.compulsion: Dragons feel compelled to come to orb as soon as possible by most direct route
call_dragons.exceptions: Dragon deities such as Tiamat unaffected
call_dragons.consequence: Dragons drawn to orb might be Hostile for compelling them against will
call_dragons.reuse_duration: Can't be used again for 1 hour
